globalConfiguration.label: Customer Service Assistant V 1
globalConfiguration.description: Helps customers create cases, check order status, and escalate issues when necessary with proper authentication and deterministic routing.

systemMessages.message: Welcome to our customer support! I can help you create a new case, check your order status, or assist with escalating existing issues. How can I help you today?
I apologize, but I'm experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again or contact us directly at support@company.com.

stateVariables.label: Next Topic
stateVariables.description: The next topic to be visited

stateVariables.label: Customer Verified
stateVariables.description: Whether customer identity has been verified

stateVariables.label: Case Type
stateVariables.description: Type of case: order_issue, product_problem, billing, technical

stateVariables.label: Case Priority
stateVariables.description: Case priority: low, normal, high, urgent

stateVariables.label: Escalation Score
stateVariables.description: Escalation score based on issue complexity (0-100)

stateVariables.label: Runtime Condition 1
stateVariables.description: Runtime condition evaluation for if statements

nodes.description: Verifies customer identity and determines service path
nodes.label: Customer Verification

actionDefinitions.label: Verify Customer Identity
actionDefinitions.description: Verifies customer identity using email address and security questions

actionDefinitions.label: Get Case History
actionDefinitions.description: Retrieves customer's previous case history for context

nodes.instructions: You are a customer service assistant. Your role is to help customers create cases, check order status, and escalate issues when necessary. You must verify customer identity through email before proceeding with sensitive operations.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Welcome to customer support! I'm here to help you with any issues you're experiencing.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
To ensure I can access your account information securely, I'll need to verify your identity first.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Please provide:

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Your email address associated with your account

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Your name as it appears on the account

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
What type of issue can I help you with today?

nodes.description: Creates and manages customer support cases with deterministic prioritization
nodes.label: Case Creation

actionDefinitions.label: Create Support Case
actionDefinitions.description: Creates a new support case in the system

actionDefinitions.label: Calculate Escalation Score
actionDefinitions.description: Calculates escalation score based on case details and customer history

nodes.instructions: You are a customer service assistant. Your role is to help customers create cases, check order status, and escalate issues when necessary. You must verify customer identity through email before proceeding with sensitive operations.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Thank you for verifying your identity, {{state.customer_name}}!

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
I see you have a {{state.case_type}} issue. Let me gather some details to create your case.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Current escalation score: {{state.escalation_score}}/100

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Priority level: {{state.case_priority}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Please describe your issue in detail. The more specific information you can provide, the better I can assist you.

nodes.description: Assesses escalation requirements and routes to appropriate support tier

boundInputs.escalation_details: "Your case has been escalated to " + state.escalation_tier

nodes.label: Escalation Assessment

actionDefinitions.label: Initiate Escalation
actionDefinitions.description: Initiates escalation to appropriate support tier

actionDefinitions.label: Notify Customer
actionDefinitions.description: Notifies customer about escalation and next steps

nodes.instructions: You are a customer service assistant. Your role is to help customers create cases, check order status, and escalate issues when necessary. You must verify customer identity through email before proceeding with sensitive operations.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Based on the complexity and nature of your issue, I've determined that your case requires escalation.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Case Details:

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Case Number: {{state.case_number}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Priority: {{state.case_priority}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Escalation Score: {{state.escalation_score}}/100

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Escalation Tier: {{state.escalation_tier}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
I'm routing your case to our {{state.escalation_tier}} team who will be better equipped to handle your specific situation.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
You can expect to hear from them within:

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- L2 Support: 2-4 hours

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Manager: 1-2 hours

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
- Senior Manager: 30 minutes

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Is there anything else I can help clarify about your case before the handoff?

boundInputs.escalation_details: "Your case has been escalated to " + state.escalation_tier

nodes.description: Attempts direct case resolution for lower priority issues

tools.name: capture_resolution_feedback
tools.description: Capture customer feedback on resolution attempt

nodes.label: Case Resolution

actionDefinitions.label: Provide Solution
actionDefinitions.description: Provides solution recommendation based on case type

actionDefinitions.label: Close Case
actionDefinitions.description: Closes resolved case and gathers customer satisfaction feedback

inputType.label: Resolution Summary
inputType.description: Summary of how issue was resolved

nodes.instructions: You are a customer service assistant. Your role is to help customers create cases, check order status, and escalate issues when necessary. You must verify customer identity through email before proceeding with sensitive operations.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
I'll work to resolve your {{state.case_type}} issue directly.

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Your Case: {{state.case_number}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Priority: {{state.case_priority}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Issue: {{state.case_description}}

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Based on similar cases, here are the most common solutions:

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
1. For order issues: Check order status and tracking information

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
2. For billing questions: Review recent charges and payment methods

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
3. For technical problems: Verify account settings and try basic troubleshooting

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
4. For product issues: Check warranty status and available support options

template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Does this help resolve your issue, or do you need me to escalate this to a specialist?

additionalParameters.system_messages: [{"message": "Welcome to our customer support! I can help you create a new case, check your order status, or assist with escalating existing issues. How can I help you today?", "messageType": "Welcome"}, {"message": "I apologize, but I'm experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again or contact us directly at support@company.com.", "messageType": "Error"}]
